title: selaginella surucucusensis
intro: Selaginella surucucusensis, also known as the "spike moss" or "resurrection fern," is a type of epiphytic plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Selaginella surucucusensis include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. Selaginella surucucusensis can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or powder, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health concerns.
